home.title: Caawinta Carruur
home.subtitle: Soo jeedin amal iyo caasimad
home.description: Xiriir la xira carruur uu baahan yahay oo degganka ah, iyagoo isaga bixiyey hoos lagu kaydiyay

impact.title: Saameynta Aad
impact.desc: Bixin kasta ayaa keenaya isbeddel dhab ah

about.title: Saabta Lije Hoy
about.missionDesc: In la xidhiidho bixiyeyaal naxariista leh oo carruur baahan oo Afrika ka jira, iyaga oo siisa waxbarashada, caafimaadka, iyo amal
about.visionDesc: Adduunyo ay carruur kasta ay siinayso waxbarashada, caafimaadka, iyo fursadda ay raacaan riyada

donate.title: Keena Isbeddel
donate.subtitle: Dooro hadda bixinta ku habeysa qalbigaaga

footer.description: Lagu beddelaya noloshada naxaariista iyo barashada
